title: Glamour markdown render upgrade for render-context
definition_of_done: RenderHuman uses Glamour with plain-text fallback; RenderAgent returns JSON; TestRenderHumanContainsLayerContent passes
outcome: RenderHuman uses glamour.Render with ascii style and plain-text fallback; TestRenderHuman passes

notes.msg: Updated RenderHuman in internal/context/render.go to use glamour.Render with ascii style, falling back to plain text on error. All tests pass (go test ./internal/context/...) and build succeeds (go build ./...).
